content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Pinnacle Education
Customer ID: C006
Contract ID: K017
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: Renewal + Expansion Discussion
Date: November 12, 2024
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Rachel Kim (Director of Academic Technology), Provost James Whitfield

Tom Rivera: Provost Whitfield, thank you for joining. Rachel has been a fantastic partner and it's great to have you involved in this conversation.

Provost Whitfield: Happy to be here. Rachel has briefed me on the platform and the impact on our accreditation process. I'll be candid — software spending gets scrutinized closely in higher education, so I want to make sure we're making a sound investment.

Tom Rivera: Completely understandable. At 50 users on the Enterprise tier, you're at $42,750 annually with the 5% discount. The accreditation documentation workflow Rachel's team built is the primary use case, but we're also seeing faculty use the platform for research collaboration across campuses.

Rachel Kim: The research collaboration use case has grown organically. Three of our four department heads are now using it without any formal rollout — they just started using it because they saw what the curriculum team was doing.

Provost Whitfield: That kind of organic adoption is a good sign. Tom, Rachel mentioned a potential two-year deal. What would that look like?

Tom Rivera: For a two-year commitment at 50 users, I could offer an additional 3% on top of the current 5% — so 8% total. That brings you to $39,330 per year, locked in for both years.

Provost Whitfield: That's a meaningful saving over two years. Rachel, are you comfortable committing for two years?

Rachel Kim: Yes. The platform is embedded in our processes now. I don't see us moving off it.

Provost Whitfield: Let's do the two-year deal. Tom, have paperwork to Rachel by end of the week.

Tom Rivera: Will do. Thank you both.
